3313170.name: Vessel
3313170.description:
"Built for war. Modified by you."

In Vessel, you take control of a customizable combat mech and face off in brutal one-on-one battles where every choice matters—from your loadout to how you fight. Vessel is a third person fighting game with armor destruction system.

Tear through enemy armor, manage system damage, and exploit weaknesses in dynamic arenas. Powered by detailed destruction and full character customization, no two fights play the same.

Choose your build. Adapt on the fly. Win by any means.
3313170.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
publishers: Ringling College of Art and Design
